<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Ruhan — Digital Marketing Specialist</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;600;700;800&family=DM+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{--navy:#0a0e1a;--blue:#00d4ff;--white:#f0f8ff;--gold:#ffd700;--glass:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);--glass-border:rgba(0,212,255,0.2);}
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background:var(--navy);color:var(--white);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;cursor:none;}
#cursor{position:fixed;width:12px;height:12px;background:var(--blue);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:transform .1s ease,width .2s,height .2s;box-shadow:0 0 15px var(--blue),0 0 30px rgba(0,212,255,.4);}
#cursor-trail{position:fixed;width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.4);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:all .15s ease;}
#particles-canvas{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;}
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:100;padding:1.2rem 5%;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;transition:all .3s ease;}
nav.scrolled{background:rgba(10,14,26,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);}
.logo{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:-1px;}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2.5rem;list-style:none;}
.nav-links a{color:rgba(240,248,255,.7);text-decoration:none;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.5px;transition:color .3s;}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--blue);}
.nav-toggle{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;padding:4px;}
.nav-toggle span{width:24px;height:2px;background:var(--white);border-radius:2px;display:block;transition:all .3s;}
section{position:relative;z-index:1;}
#home{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;padding:0 5%;padding-top:80px;}
.hero-inner{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:4rem;align-items:center;width:100%;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.hero-text h1{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(3rem,6vw,5.5rem);font-weight:800;line-height:1.05;letter-spacing:-2px;color:var(--white);}
.hero-text h1 span{color:var(--blue);}
.hero-subtitle{margin-top:1.5rem;font-size:1.1rem;color:rgba(240,248,255,.6);font-weight:400;letter-spacing:.5px;}
.hero-subtitle span{color:var(--gold);}
.btn-primary{display:inline-block;margin-top:2.5rem;padding:1rem 2.5rem;background:transparent;border:1.5px solid var(--blue);color:var(--blue);border-radius:50px;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:600;text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.5px;cursor:none;transition:all .3s ease;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.btn-primary::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:-100%;width:100%;height:100%;background:var(--blue);transition:left .3s ease;z-index:-1;}
.btn-primary:hover{color:var(--navy);box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,212,255,.5);}
.btn-primary:hover::before{left:0;}
.hero-photo-wrap{display:flex;justify-content:center;perspective:1000px;}
.hero-photo-frame{width:380px;height:500px;border:2px solid var(--blue);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(0,212,255,.3),0 0 80px rgba(0,212,255,.1);animation:float 4s ease-in-out infinite;transform-style:preserve-3d;transition:transform .1s ease;}
.hero-photo-frame img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top center;display:block;}
.hero-photo-frame::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(10,14,26,.3) 0%,transparent 60%);}
@keyframes float{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0px);}50%{transform:translateY(-18px);}}
#about{padding:6rem 5%;}
.about-inner{max-width:900px;margin:0 auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2.5rem;text-align:center;}
.about-photo-wrap{display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;width:100%;}
.about-photo-circle{width:200px;height:200px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;border:3px solid var(--blue);box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(0,212,255,.4);flex-shrink:0;}
.about-photo-circle img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top center;}
.about-bio{font-size:1.05rem;color:rgba(240,248,255,.7);line-height:1.75;margin-bottom:2.5rem;text-align:center;}
.about-bio strong{color:var(--blue);}
.stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:1.5rem;}
.stat-card{background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:16px;padding:1.5rem;text-align:center;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);transition:transform .3s,box-shadow .3s;}
.stat-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:0 10px 30px rgba(0,212,255,.15);}
.stat-num{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:2.2rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--blue);display:block;}
.stat-label{font-size:.85rem;color:rgba(240,248,255,.6);margin-top:4px;}
.section-tag{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--blue);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:.75rem;}
.section-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3.2rem);font-weight:800;color:var(--white);letter-spacing:-1px;margin-bottom:3rem;text-align:center;}
.section-header{text-align:center;}
#services{padding:6rem 5%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.01);}
.services-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2rem;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;perspective:1200px;}
.flip-card{height:340px;cursor:none;}
.flip-card-inner{width:100%;height:100%;position:relative;transform-style:preserve-3d;transition:transform .7s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);}
.flip-card:hover .flip-card-inner{transform:rotateY(180deg);}
.flip-front,.flip-back{position:absolute;inset:0;backface-visibility:hidden;-webkit-backface-visibility:hidden;border-radius:20px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:.9rem;padding:2rem;background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);backdrop-filter:blur(15px);}
.flip-card:hover .flip-front{box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,212,255,.2);}
.flip-back{transform:rotateY(180deg);background:rgba(0,212,255,.08);border-color:rgba(0,212,255,.4);text-align:center;gap:.7rem;}
.service-icon{font-size:2.8rem;line-height:1;}
.service-title{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--white);}
.flip-back p{color:rgba(240,248,255,.8);font-size:.88rem;line-height:1.6;}
.flip-back .service-icon-sm{font-size:1.8rem;}
.btn-whatsapp{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:.3rem;padding:.65rem 1.5rem;background:#25D366;border:none;border-radius:50px;color:#fff;font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700;text-decoration:none;cursor:none;transition:all .3s;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(37,211,102,.3);letter-spacing:.3px;}
.btn-whatsapp:hover{box-shadow:0 0 35px rgba(37,211,102,.6);transform:translateY(-2px);}
#results{padding:6rem 5%;}
.results-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2rem;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;perspective:1000px;}
.case-card{background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:20px;padding:2rem;backdrop-filter:blur(15px);transition:transform .1s ease,box-shadow .3s;transform-style:preserve-3d;cursor:none;}
.case-card:hover{box-shadow:0 20px 50px rgba(0,212,255,.15);}
.case-tag{display:inline-block;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);border:1px solid rgba(255,215,0,.3);border-radius:50px;padding:4px 14px;margin-bottom:1rem;}
.case-metric{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:2.5rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--blue);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.5rem;}
.case-desc{color:rgba(240,248,255,.6);font-size:.9rem;line-height:1.6;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.case-link{color:var(--blue);text-decoration:none;font-size:.9rem;font-weight:600;transition:letter-spacing .3s;}
.case-link:hover{letter-spacing:1px;}
#skills{padding:6rem 5%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.01);}
.skills-inner{max-width:800px;margin:0 auto;}
.skill-item{margin-bottom:2rem;}
.skill-meta{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px;}
.skill-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.95rem;}
.skill-pct{color:var(--blue);font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;}
.skill-track{height:8px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:50px;overflow:hidden;}
.skill-fill{height:100%;width:0%;border-radius:50px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--blue),var(--gold));transition:width 1.5s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);}
#testimonials{padding:6rem 5%;}
.testimonials-wrap{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;position:relative;}
.testimonials-track{overflow:hidden;}
.testimonials-slider{display:flex;transition:transform .5s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);}
.testi-card{min-width:100%;background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:20px;padding:3rem;backdrop-filter:blur(15px);text-align:center;}
.testi-quote{font-size:1.15rem;color:rgba(240,248,255,.85);line-height:1.8;font-style:italic;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.testi-stars{color:var(--gold);font-size:1.2rem;letter-spacing:3px;margin-bottom:1rem;}
.testi-name{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-weight:700;color:var(--blue);}
.testi-role{font-size:.85rem;color:rgba(240,248,255,.5);}
.testi-controls{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:1rem;margin-top:2rem;}
.testi-btn{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;border:1.5px solid var(--blue);background:transparent;color:var(--blue);font-size:1.2rem;cursor:none;transition:all .3s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.testi-btn:hover{background:var(--blue);color:var(--navy);}
#contact{padding:6rem 5% 4rem;}
.contact-inner{max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;}
.contact-inner .section-title{margin-bottom:.5rem;}
.contact-sub{color:rgba(240,248,255,.6);margin-bottom:3rem;font-size:1.05rem;}
.contact-form{text-align:left;}
.form-group{margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.form-group input,.form-group textarea{width:100%;padding:1rem 1.4rem;background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:12px;color:var(--white);font-family:'DM Sans',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;outline:none;transition:border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);}
.form-group input::placeholder,.form-group textarea::placeholder{color:rgba(240,248,255,.35);}
.form-group input:focus,.form-group textarea:focus{border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,212,255,.15);}
.form-group textarea{height:140px;resize:none;}
.btn-submit{width:100%;padding:1.1rem;background:var(--blue);border:none;border-radius:12px;color:var(--navy);font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;cursor:none;transition:all .3s;box-shadow:0 0 30px rgba(0,212,255,.3);}
.btn-submit:hover{box-shadow:0 0 50px rgba(0,212,255,.5);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.social-icons{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:1.5rem;margin-top:2.5rem;}
.social-icon{width:54px;height:54px;border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .3s;text-decoration:none;cursor:none;}
.social-icon:hover{border-color:var(--blue);box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,212,255,.3);transform:translateY(-3px);}
.social-icon svg{width:22px;height:22px;fill:rgba(240,248,255,.7);transition:fill .3s;}
.social-icon:hover svg{fill:var(--blue);}
footer{text-align:center;padding:2rem;color:rgba(240,248,255,.3);font-size:.85rem;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.05);position:relative;z-index:1;}
.fade-up{opacity:0;transform:translateY(30px);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease;}
.fade-up.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
@media(max-width:900px){
  .hero-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;text-align:center;}
  .hero-photo-wrap{order:-1;}
  .hero-photo-frame{width:260px;height:340px;}
  .about-inner{grid-template-columns:1fr;text-align:center;}
  .about-photo-wrap{justify-content:center;}
  .services-grid,.results-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);}
}
@media(max-width:600px){
  .nav-links{display:none;flex-direction:column;position:absolute;top:70px;left:0;right:0;background:rgba(10,14,26,.97);padding:2rem;gap:1.5rem;}
  .nav-links.open{display:flex;}
  .nav-toggle{display:flex;}
  .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  #cursor,#cursor-trail{display:none;}
  body{cursor:auto;}
  .btn-primary,.testi-btn,.btn-submit,.social-icon,.btn-whatsapp{cursor:pointer;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="cursor"></div>
<div id="cursor-trail"></div>
<canvas id="particles-canvas"></canvas>

<nav id="navbar">
  <a href="#home" class="logo">Ruhan.</a>
  <ul class="nav-links" id="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#home">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#services">Services</a></li>
    <li><a href="#results">Results</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact">Contact</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="nav-toggle" id="nav-toggle" aria-label="Toggle menu">
    <span></span><span></span><span></span>
  </button>
</nav>

<section id="home">
  <div class="hero-inner">
    <div class="hero-text fade-up">
      <h1>Turn Clicks<br><span>Into Clients.</span></h1>
      <p class="hero-subtitle"><span>Paid Ads</span> &middot; Organic Growth &middot; <span>Content That Converts</span></p>
      <a href="#results" class="btn-primary">See My Work &rarr;</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-photo-wrap fade-up">
      <div class="hero-photo-frame" id="hero-frame">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Ruhan - Digital Marketer">
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="about">
  <div class="about-inner">
    <div class="about-photo-wrap fade-up">
      <div class="about-photo-circle">
        <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Ruhan">
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="fade-up">
      <p class="section-tag">About Me</p>
      <p class="about-bio">I&rsquo;m <strong>Ruhan</strong>, a digital marketing specialist who turns brand goals into measurable results. From high-converting ad campaigns to organic content that builds real communities &mdash; I create strategies that work.</p>
      <div class="stats-grid">
        <div class="stat-card"><span class="stat-num" data-target="50" data-suffix="+">0</span><span class="stat-label">Campaigns Launched</span></div>
        <div class="stat-card"><span class="stat-num" data-target="2" data-suffix="M+">0</span><span class="stat-label">Organic Reach</span></div>
        <div class="stat-card"><span class="stat-num" data-target="3" data-suffix="x">0</span><span class="stat-label">Average ROAS</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="services">
  <div class="section-header fade-up">
    <p class="section-tag">What I Do</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Services That Deliver</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="services-grid">
    <div class="flip-card fade-up">
      <div class="flip-card-inner">
        <div class="flip-front"><div class="service-icon">&#128226;</div><div class="service-title">Paid Social Ads</div></div>
        <div class="flip-back">
          <div class="service-icon-sm">&#127919;</div>
          <p>Meta, Google &amp; TikTok ad campaigns engineered for maximum ROI and conversion rate.</p>
          <a href="https://wa.me/8801647858094?text=Hi%20Ruhan!%20I'm%20interested%20in%20Paid%20Social%20Ads." class="btn-whatsapp" target="_blank">&#128172; Get Started</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="flip-card fade-up" style="transition-delay:.1s">
      <div class="flip-card-inner">
        <div class="flip-front"><div class="service-icon">&#127807;</div><div class="service-title">Organic Growth</div></div>
        <div class="flip-back">
          <div class="service-icon-sm">&#128200;</div>
          <p>SEO-driven content and community building strategies that compound over time.</p>
          <a href="https://wa.me/8801647858094?text=Hi%20Ruhan!%20I'm%20interested%20in%20Organic%20Growth." class="btn-whatsapp" target="_blank">&#128172; Get Started</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="flip-card fade-up" style="transition-delay:.2s">
      <div class="flip-card-inner">
        <div class="flip-front"><div class="service-icon">&#9997;&#65039;</div><div class="service-title">Content Creation</div></div>
        <div class="flip-back">
          <div class="service-icon-sm">&#127916;</div>
          <p>Reels, carousels, copy &mdash; content that stops the scroll and drives real engagement.</p>
          <a href="https://wa.me/8801647858094?text=Hi%20Ruhan!%20I'm%20interested%20in%20Content%20Creation." class="btn-whatsapp" target="_blank">&#128172; Get Started</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="results">
  <div class="section-header fade-up">
    <p class="section-tag">Portfolio</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Results That Speak</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="results-grid">
    <div class="case-card fade-up" id="card1">
      <span class="case-tag">E-Commerce</span>
      <div class="case-metric">340%</div>
      <p class="case-desc">ROAS increase for an online fashion brand through Meta Ads funnel optimization and creative testing.</p>
      <a href="https://wa.me/8801647858094" class="case-link" target="_blank">View Case Study &rarr;</a>
    </div>
    <div class="case-card fade-up" id="card2" style="transition-delay:.1s">
      <span class="case-tag">Local Business</span>
      <div class="case-metric">12K+</div>
      <p class="case-desc">New followers gained in 60 days for a local restaurant through organic reels and community engagement.</p>
      <a href="https://wa.me/8801647858094" class="case-link" target="_blank">View Case Study &rarr;</a>
    </div>
    <div class="case-card fade-up" id="card3" style="transition-delay:.2s">
      <span class="case-tag">Personal Brand</span>
      <div class="case-metric">4.2M</div>
      <p class="case-desc">Organic impressions achieved for a personal brand creator through strategic content planning and SEO.</p>
      <a href="https://wa.me/8801647858094" class="case-link" target="_blank">View Case Study &rarr;</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="skills">
  <div class="section-header fade-up">
    <p class="section-tag">Expertise</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">Skills &amp; Proficiency</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="skills-inner">
    <div class="skill-item fade-up"><div class="skill-meta"><span class="skill-name">Meta Ads</span><span class="skill-pct">92%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="92"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-item fade-up"><div class="skill-meta"><span class="skill-name">Google Ads</span><span class="skill-pct">85%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="85"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-item fade-up"><div class="skill-meta"><span class="skill-name">Content Strategy</span><span class="skill-pct">90%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="90"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-item fade-up"><div class="skill-meta"><span class="skill-name">Copywriting</span><span class="skill-pct">88%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="88"></div></div></div>
    <div class="skill-item fade-up"><div class="skill-meta"><span class="skill-name">Analytics &amp; Data</span><span class="skill-pct">80%</span></div><div class="skill-track"><div class="skill-fill" data-width="80"></div></div></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="testimonials">
  <div class="section-header fade-up">
    <p class="section-tag">Client Love</p>
    <h2 class="section-title">What They Say</h2>
  </div>
  <div class="testimonials-wrap fade-up">
    <div class="testimonials-track">
      <div class="testimonials-slider" id="slider">
        <div class="testi-card">
          <p class="testi-stars">&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;</p>
          <p class="testi-quote">&ldquo;Ruhan tripled our ad ROAS in just two months. His knowledge of Meta&rsquo;s algorithm is next-level, and he genuinely cares about results.&rdquo;</p>
          <p class="testi-name">Sarah K.</p>
          <p class="testi-role">CEO, StyleHaven &mdash; E-Commerce Brand</p>
        </div>
        <div class="testi-card">
          <p class="testi-stars">&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;</p>
          <p class="testi-quote">&ldquo;Our Instagram went from 800 to 14,000 followers in 3 months. The content strategy Ruhan built for us changed everything.&rdquo;</p>
          <p class="testi-name">Ahmed T.</p>
          <p class="testi-role">Owner, Caf&eacute; Royale &mdash; Local Business</p>
        </div>
        <div class="testi-card">
          <p class="testi-stars">&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;&#9733;</p>
          <p class="testi-quote">&ldquo;I was skeptical about paid ads but Ruhan&rsquo;s approach is data-driven and transparent. Best investment I&rsquo;ve made in my personal brand.&rdquo;</p>
          <p class="testi-name">Mira J.</p>
          <p class="testi-role">Content Creator &amp; Coach</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="testi-controls">
      <button class="testi-btn" id="prev-btn">&larr;</button>
      <button class="testi-btn" id="next-btn">&rarr;</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<section id="contact">
  <div class="contact-inner">
    <div class="fade-up">
      <p class="section-tag">Get In Touch</p>
      <h2 class="section-title">Ready to Grow?</h2>
      <p class="contact-sub">Let&rsquo;s build something that converts.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="contact-form fade-up">
      <div class="form-group"><input type="text" placeholder="Your Name" id="fname"></div>
      <div class="form-group"><input type="email" placeholder="Your Email" id="femail"></div>
      <div class="form-group"><textarea placeholder="Tell me about your project..." id="fmsg"></textarea></div>
      <button class="btn-submit" id="fsubmit">Send Message &rarr;</button>
    </div>
    <div class="social-icons fade-up">
      <a href="https://wa.me/8801647858094" class="social-icon" title="WhatsApp" target="_blank">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M17.472 14.382c-.297-.149-1.758-.867-2.03-.967-.273-.099-.471-.148-.67.15-.197.297-.767.966-.94 1.164-.173.199-.347.223-.644.075-.297-.15-1.255-.463-2.39-1.475-.883-.788-1.48-1.761-1.653-2.059-.173-.297-.018-.458.13-.606.134-.133.298-.347.446-.52.149-.174.198-.298.298-.497.099-.198.05-.371-.025-.52-.075-.149-.669-1.612-.916-2.207-.242-.579-.487-.5-.669-.51a12.8 12.8 0 0 0-.57-.01c-.198 0-.52.074-.792.372-.272.297-1.04 1.016-1.04 2.479 0 1.462 1.065 2.875 1.213 3.074.149.198 2.096 3.2 5.077 4.487.709.306 1.262.489 1.694.625.712.227 1.36.195 1.871.118.571-.085 1.758-.719 2.006-1.413.248-.694.248-1.289.173-1.413-.074-.124-.272-.198-.57-.347m-5.421 7.403h-.004a9.87 9.87 0 0 1-5.031-1.378l-.361-.214-3.741.982.998-3.648-.235-.374a9.86 9.86 0 0 1-1.51-5.26c.001-5.45 4.436-9.884 9.888-9.884 2.64 0 5.122 1.03 6.988 2.898a9.825 9.825 0 0 1 2.893 6.994c-.003 5.45-4.437 9.884-9.885 9.884m8.413-18.297A11.815 11.815 0 0 0 12.05 0C5.495 0 .16 5.335.157 11.892c0 2.096.547 4.142 1.588 5.945L.057 24l6.305-1.654a11.882 11.882 0 0 0 5.683 1.448h.005c6.554 0 11.89-5.335 11.893-11.893a11.821 11.821 0 0 0-3.48-8.413z"/></svg>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.instagram.com/ruhan.shah15/" class="social-icon" title="Instagram" target="_blank">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zm0-2.163c-3.259 0-3.667.014-4.947.072-4.358.2-6.78 2.618-6.98 6.98-.059 1.281-.073 1.689-.073 4.948 0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98 1.281.058 1.689.072 4.948.072 3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98-1.281-.059-1.69-.073-4.949-.073zm0 5.838c-3.403 0-6.162 2.759-6.162 6.162s2.759 6.163 6.162 6.163 6.162-2.759 6.162-6.163c0-3.403-2.759-6.162-6.162-6.162zm0 10.162c-2.209 0-4-1.79-4-4 0-2.209 1.791-4 4-4s4 1.791 4 4c0 2.21-1.791 4-4 4zm6.406-11.845c-.796 0-1.441.645-1.441 1.44s.645 1.44 1.441 1.44c.795 0 1.439-.645 1.439-1.44s-.644-1.44-1.439-1.44z"/></svg>
      </a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/shah0ruhan/" class="social-icon" title="LinkedIn" target="_blank">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433c-1.144 0-2.063-.926-2.063-2.065 0-1.138.92-2.063 2.063-2.063 1.14 0 2.064.925 2.064 2.063 0 1.139-.925 2.065-2.064 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/></svg>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <p>&copy; 2025 Ruhan. Crafted with purpose. &middot; <a href="https://wa.me/8801647858094" style="color:var(--blue);text-decoration:none;">Let&rsquo;s Work Together</a></p>
</footer>

<script>
const canvas=document.getElementById('particles-canvas'),ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');
function resize(){canvas.width=window.innerWidth;canvas.height=window.innerHeight;}
resize();window.addEventListener('resize',resize);
class Particle{
  constructor(){this.reset();}
  reset(){this.x=Math.random()*canvas.width;this.y=Math.random()*canvas.height;this.vx=(Math.random()-.5)*.4;this.vy=(Math.random()-.5)*.4;this.r=Math.random()*2+1;this.alpha=Math.random()*.5+.2;}
  update(){this.x+=this.vx;this.y+=this.vy;if(this.x<0||this.x>canvas.width)this.vx*=-1;if(this.y<0||this.y>canvas.height)this.vy*=-1;}
  draw(){ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(this.x,this.y,this.r,0,Math.PI*2);ctx.fillStyle=`rgba(0,212,255,${this.alpha})`;ctx.fill();}
}
const parts=[];for(let i=0;i<80;i++)parts.push(new Particle());
function drawLines(){for(let i=0;i<parts.length;i++)for(let j=i+1;j<parts.length;j++){const dx=parts[i].x-parts[j].x,dy=parts[i].y-parts[j].y,d=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy);if(d<120){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(parts[i].x,parts[i].y);ctx.lineTo(parts[j].x,parts[j].y);ctx.strokeStyle=`rgba(0,212,255,${.12*(1-d/120)})`;ctx.lineWidth=.5;ctx.stroke();}}}
function animate(){ctx.clearRect(0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);parts.forEach(p=>{p.update();p.draw();});drawLines();requestAnimationFrame(animate);}
animate();
const cursor=document.getElementById('cursor'),trail=document.getElementById('cursor-trail');
if(cursor){let tx=0,ty=0,cx=0,cy=0;
  document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{tx=e.clientX;ty=e.clientY;cursor.style.left=tx+'px';cursor.style.top=ty+'px';});
  function ut(){cx+=(tx-cx)*.15;cy+=(ty-cy)*.15;trail.style.left=cx+'px';trail.style.top=cy+'px';requestAnimationFrame(ut);}ut();
  document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.flip-card,.case-card').forEach(el=>{
    el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>{cursor.style.transform='translate(-50%,-50%) scale(2)';trail.style.opacity='.5';});
    el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{cursor.style.transform='translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1)';trail.style.opacity='1';});
  });
}
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>document.getElementById('navbar').classList.toggle('scrolled',window.scrollY>50));
document.getElementById('nav-toggle').addEventListener('click',()=>document.getElementById('nav-links').classList.toggle('open'));
document.querySelectorAll('.nav-links a').forEach(a=>a.addEventListener('click',()=>document.getElementById('nav-links').classList.remove('open')));
const heroFrame=document.getElementById('hero-frame');
if(heroFrame){heroFrame.parentElement.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{const r=heroFrame.getBoundingClientRect();heroFrame.style.transform=`rotateX(${((e.clientY-r.top-r.height/2)/r.height)*14}deg) rotateY(${((e.clientX-r.left-r.width/2)/r.width)*-14}deg)`;}); heroFrame.parentElement.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>heroFrame.style.transform='');}
['card1','card2','card3'].forEach(id=>{const c=document.getElementById(id);if(!c)return;c.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{const r=c.getBoundingClientRect();c.style.transform=`rotateX(${((e.clientY-r.top-r.height/2)/r.height)*10}deg) rotateY(${((e.clientX-r.left-r.width/2)/r.width)*-10}deg) translateZ(8px)`;}); c.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>c.style.transform='');});
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(entries=>{entries.forEach(entry=>{if(!entry.isIntersecting)return;const el=entry.target;el.classList.add('visible');
  el.querySelectorAll('.stat-num[data-target]').forEach(num=>{const target=parseInt(num.dataset.target),suffix=num.dataset.suffix||'+';let s=0;const step=target/60;const t=setInterval(()=>{s=Math.min(s+step,target);num.textContent=Math.round(s)+suffix;if(s>=target)clearInterval(t);},20);});
  obs.unobserve(el);});},{threshold:.15});
document.querySelectorAll('.fade-up').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
document.querySelectorAll('.skill-item').forEach(item=>{const bar=item.querySelector('.skill-fill');const o=new IntersectionObserver(e=>{if(e[0].isIntersecting){bar.style.width=bar.dataset.width+'%';o.unobserve(item);}},{threshold:.5});o.observe(item);});
let cur=0;const slides=document.querySelectorAll('.testi-card'),slider=document.getElementById('slider');
function goTo(n){cur=(n+slides.length)%slides.length;slider.style.transform=`translateX(-${cur*100}%)`;}
document.getElementById('prev-btn').addEventListener('click',()=>goTo(cur-1));
document.getElementById('next-btn').addEventListener('click',()=>goTo(cur+1));
setInterval(()=>goTo(cur+1),5000);
document.getElementById('fsubmit').addEventListener('click',function(){
  const name=document.getElementById('fname').value.trim(),email=document.getElementById('femail').value.trim(),msg=document.getElementById('fmsg').value.trim();
  if(!name||!email||!msg){this.textContent='Please fill all fields!';setTimeout(()=>this.textContent='Send Message →',2000);return;}
  window.open(`https://wa.me/8801647858094?text=Hi%20Ruhan!%20My%20name%20is%20${encodeURIComponent(name)}%20(${encodeURIComponent(email)}).%20${encodeURIComponent(msg)}`,'_blank');
  this.textContent='Sent! ✓';this.style.background='#25D366';
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
